TEn: The employee (waiter) accesses the login form
SP: Enter username and password
The mobile app provides waiter data to the web app
The mobile app receives user state (Connected/Not connected)
The mobile app displays the user state (Connected/Not connected)
The mobile app receives the Error/Confirmation message
The mobile app displays Error/Confirmation messages from the web application

TEn: The employee (waiter) adds a new order
SP: The waiter enters the table where the customer wants to be installed
The mobile app sends the selected table to the web app and then the web app creates a new order
The mobile app receives the item families list
The mobile app displays the item families list to the waiter
The waiter enters the item family based on the items requested by the customer
The mobile app sends the selected item family to the web app
The mobile app receives the item list of the selected family
The mobile app displays the list of items to the waiter
The waiter enters the items required by the customer and specifies the recommended quantity and customer comments
The mobile app sends the selected items, recommended quantities and customer comments to the web app
The mobile app receives Error/Confirmation messages from the web app
The mobile app displays Error/Confirmation messages to the waiter

TEn: The employee (waiter) modifies an existing order
SP: The waiter enters the table where the customer is installed
The mobile app sends the selected table to the web app
The mobile app receives the list of items previously selected by the customer with their quantities and comments
The mobile app displays the items previously selected by the customer with their quantities and comments to the waiter
The waiter deletes the existing item, modifies items' quantities and/or modifies items' comments
The mobile app sends the modified items to the web app
The mobile app receives Error/Confirmation messages from the web app
The mobile app displays Error/Confirmation messages to the waiter

TEn: The web app receives the selected items
SP: The web app receives the selected items, quantities and customer comments
The web app creates the new order
The web app sends Error/Confirmation messages to the mobile app

TEn: The mobile app sends the selected table
SP: The web app receives the selected table
The web app retrieves the list of item families selected by the customer
The web app sends the list of item families selected by the customer to the mobile app
The web app retrieves the list of items selected by the customer
The web app sends the list of items selected by the customer
The admin enters the employee data
The web app retrieves the employee’s data to verify if the employee exists
The web app adds the new employee
The web app displays Error/Confirmation messages

TEn: The admin views the users list
SP: The admin selects to view the employees list
The web app retrieves the employees list
The web app displays the employees list
The web app displays Error/Confirmation messages
The admin enters the employee to be deleted
The web app deletes the selected employee
The web app displays Error/Confirmation messages
